description: You are an online merchant preparing for a summer clearance sale. Create a new email campaign in Vtiger CRM with the following details: Campaign Name 'Summer Clearance 2024', Campaign Type 'Email', Campaign Status 'Planning', Closing Date '2024-07-31', Expected Revenue '50000', Budget Cost '5000', Target Size '500', Assigned To 'Admin', and Description 'Email campaign for summer clearance sale with up to 40% discount on selected inventory items.' Associate at least 2 existing contacts from the system with this campaign.
